mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DOCS_LOGIN_HISTORY ( HISTORY_SEQ, USER_CD, ACCESS_IP, LOGIN_TYPE, INSERT_DT, USER_NM, USER_ID, BIZ_NO, DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM, EMAIL, COMPANY_NM, COMPANY_CD ) VALUES( #{historySeq}, #{sessionUser.userCd}, #{accessIp}, #{loginType}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{sessionUser.userNm}, #{sessionUser.userId}, #{sessionUser.bizNo}, #{sessionUser.deptCd}, #{sessionUser.deptNm}, #{sessionUser.email}, #{sessionUser.companyNm}, #{sessionUser.companyCd} )
